issue.name: SQL Injection
issue.issueDetail: Unsanitized user input reaches a SQL query.
issue.remediationBackground: Use parameterized queries and server-side validation.

requestresponse.request: GET /users/123?userId=123 HTTP/1.1 Host: demo.example.com Cookie: session=secret
requestresponse.response:
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error Content-Type: text/html
SQL syntax error near '123'
